---
name: Whole Thesis - Compliance, Figures, and Format
description: Check thesis against venue rules, formatting consistency, figure/table usage, and submission readiness.
applyTo: manuscript/**/*.tex,venue/requirements.md,venue/formatting-requirements.md,manuscript/**/figures/**,manuscript/**/tables/**
---

# Whole Thesis - Compliance, Figures, and Format

## Scope
- Submission-readiness check against explicit requirements.

## Must Include in Assessment
- Requirement-by-requirement compliance status.
- Figure/table numbering, caption quality, and in-text reference integrity.
- Heading/navigation consistency.
- High-risk submission blockers.

## Should Not Include
- Assumed rules not in venue requirements.
- Decorative/non-required formatting advice.
- “Fully compliant” claim without evidence.

## Output (compact)
1. Compliance checklist (pass/fail + evidence note).
2. Figure/table findings.
3. Formatting/navigation risks.
4. Submission blockers.
5. Final preflight checklist.
